name: items
description: Unified life entity: tasks, notes, deadlines, and study materials. Scoped per app user via user_id.

columns.name: type
columns.description: What kind of item this is.

columns.name: status
columns.description: Free-form lifecycle: todo | in_progress | done | learning | learned | archived.

columns.name: waiting_on
columns.description: Follow-up tracker: who/what this is blocked on.

columns.name: metadata
columns.description: Arbitrary structured metadata (AI traces, source ids, etc.).

columns.name: owner_id
columns.description: Owning app user id (LifeOS auth). Named owner_id because user_id is Lemma-reserved.

columns.name: source
columns.description: Origin: manual | chat_memory | agent | workflow | seed.
